title: aster mangshanensis
intro: Aster mangshanensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to China and is also known as Mangshan Aster or Chinese Aster. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Aster mangshanensis include its potential to reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of fever and rheumatism, and herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and extracts made from the plant's flowers and leaves.
